UnitAbilities.Title: Mindlock
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Tech-Priest model is leading this model’s unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of this model’s weapons by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bound Creation
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Tech-Priest model is leading this model’s unit, that Tech-Priest model has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

LeaderInfo.Description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a Tech-Priest Infantry model. If it does, until the end of the battle, this model counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mindlock
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Tech-Priest model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by Servitor models in this unit by 1.

LeaderInfo.Description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a Tech-Priest Enginseer model (a unit cannot have more than one Servitors unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

UnitAbilities.Title: Enhanced data-tether
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP

UnitAbilities.Title: Omnispex
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Titan Guard
UnitAbilities.Text: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase. When doing so, if there are one or more friendly Adeptus Titanicus units on the battlefield, you can re-roll the subsequent charge roll.

Infos.Title: SECUTARII
Infos.Text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Skitarii Vanguard unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Enhanced data-tether
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP

UnitAbilities.Title: Omnispex
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blind Barrage
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy Infantry unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is blinded. While a unit is blinded, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: SECUTARII
Infos.Text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Skitarii Vanguard unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Termite Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text:
This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus
Mechanicus Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack or Kataphron models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Technoarcane Zealotry
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers, improve this model’s Leadership characteristic by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cybercanid Mount
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", and it gains the Scouts 9" ability. Remove the Infantry keyword, add the Mounted keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Serberys Raiders, Serberys Sulphurhounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cybenetica Overseer
UnitAbilities.Text:
Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Kastelan Robots.

You can attach this model to a Kastelan Robots unit, even if one or more Cybernetica Datasmith models have already been attached to it. In such cases, if that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths. While attached to a Kastelan Robots unit, this model loses the Infantry keyword and models in that unit have the Doctrina Imperatives Faction ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Flight Pack
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", and it gains the Deep Strike ability. Add the Fly and Jump Pack keywords, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Pteraxii Skystalkers, Pteraxii Sterylizors.

UnitAbilities.Title: Silk Limbs
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 8", and it gains the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Sicarian Infiltrators, Sicarian Ruststalkers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Control Edict
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Galvanic Field
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Omnissiah's Blessing
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, select one friendly Adeptus Mechanicus model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, if it is a Vehicle model, until the start of your next Command phase, that model has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Seekers of Divine Arcana
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prioritisation Protocol
UnitAbilities.Text: Melee weapons equipped by this model have [PRECISION].

UnitAbilities.Title: Cybercanid Mount
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", and it gains the Scouts 9" ability. Remove the Infantry keyword, add the Mounted keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Serberys Raiders, Serberys Sulphurhounds.
